role: fault-injection SUT (Sniper negative tests + 10 code-level injected faults, detected via SUT-reported faultName markers)
source: FudanSELab TrainTicket, fault-injection fork https://github.com/AsifShaafi/train-ticket-injection (branch: injection), deployed locally via docker-compose; see deploy/deploy.sh.
deployment: deploy/deploy.sh builds the 7 fault-bearing services from source (ts-auth-service, ts-admin-basic-info-service, ts-admin-order-service, ts-admin-route-service, ts-admin-travel-service, ts-travel-service, ts-travel-plan-service) and pulls the ~33 upstream codewisdom/* images; gateway on http://localhost:8080; built-in account admin/222222.
trace_format: Jaeger query-API JSON ({"data":[{"traceID","spans","processes"}]}); consumed by io.mist.core.oracle.shape.TraceModel.fromJaegerJson and io.mist.core.workflow.TraceWorkflowExtractor (reads concrete paths from http.url/http.target span tags).

traces.note: 16 spans: POST /adminroute, NumberFormatException on a malformed value propagates http=500 x5 + otel=ERROR x7 to the root (TrainTicket fails LOUD). Exception message echoes the bad value; used in probe-attribution evidence.
captured nominal traffic; part of the seed corpus the workflow extractor consumes for generation.

injected_faults.detection: A faulty request returns HTTP 200 with body {"data":{"injected":true,"faultName":"..."}}; MIST matches faultName against this registry (MultiServiceRESTAssuredWriter -> FaultDetectionTracker). Run trainticket_twostage_test_42 detects 10/10 (debug/negative_test/runs/run22-fault-detection-10of10.txt).

soft_error_evidence: docs/main-contribution/evidence/responseenvelope_live_softerror.txt — the shipped ResponseEnvelope invariant + real DeepSeek classifier flip a TrainTicket soft-error body (HTTP 200, {"status":0,...}) to RESPONSE_ENVELOPE=FAIL, where a status-class oracle passes.
